rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Network Connections from the Command Line with no Parameters

rules.rule_text:
title: Network Connections from the Command Line with no Parameters
id: 1b49c5af-3774-4364-9c49-827fd59417cb
status: experimental
description: "It is unusual for these processes to attempt network connections with\
  \ an empty command line, \nwhich can indicate malicious command and control (C2)\
  \ activity. Part of the RedCanary 2024 \nThreat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/raspberry-robin/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \dllhost.exe
    CommandLine: null
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
